markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Screening John-Anthony Disotto for the Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Challenge:** The role requires bridging editorial judgment with technical articulation to improve AI content pipelines. The key metric is reducing human post-processing time from hours to a target of 10–15 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [**Candidate Profile:** J-A is a senior tech writer at TechRadar with prior editorial experience at iMore, where he built a new how-to section from scratch. He has personal experience experimenting with LLMs for research and tone-matching, despite workplace restrictions.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [**Critical Skill:** Success hinges on a proactive, "voracious" adoption of LLM tools to self-unblock and iterate on pipelines, a significant shift from traditional media's resource-constrained environment.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
  - [**Company Culture:** GrowthX is a fully remote, non-toxic startup where MEs are treated as "first users" of the product, with aggressive questioning and collaboration actively encouraged.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)

## Topics

### The GrowthX Challenge: Bridging Editorial & Technical

  - [**Role Focus:** Process-oriented, defining and articulating content quality to improve internal AI platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**The "Delta":** The core task is identifying the gap between pipeline output and desired quality, then articulating it for engineers. This involves:](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Prompt Engineering:** Refining instructions for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Context Engineering:** Providing rich, relevant information.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Engineering:** Filing detailed tickets when the issue is technical.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**The Goal → Time Compression:** Reduce human post-processing time from hours to 10–15 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
      - [**Example:** A clinically accurate article, reviewed by an OB, naturopath, and lawyer, can be produced with minimal human touch.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
      - [**Significance:** This efficiency is a "brain-breaker" for clients accustomed to slow, expensive content production.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)

### Candidate Background & Editorial Philosophy

  - [**Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [**Current:** Senior Tech Writer at TechRadar (Future Publishing), covering consumer AI.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [**Prior:** Editor at iMore (Future Publishing), where he built a new how-to section.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [**Editorial Judgment:**](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [Prioritizes context and accuracy; "better to not go in depth than go in depth and be wrong."](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [Applies the "done is better than perfect" principle, focusing on expert tone over endless tweaks.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Process Improvement Example (iMore):**](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Problem:** No structure for evergreen how-to content.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [**Solution:** Created a style guide and worked hands-on with freelancers to elevate content beyond dry, step-by-step instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Process Improvement Example (TechRadar):**](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Problem:** Needed to commission 40 articles in one month.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Solution:** Focused all content on personal interactions with ChatGPT, a trend identified via Google Discover.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Result:** February became the AI section's most successful month of the year.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### AI Familiarity & Adoption

  - [**Workplace Usage:** Limited by Future's strict AI policy.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Uses a Notion/ChatGPT integration for daily trend scanning.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [Uses ChatGPT as a conversational partner for headline ideation.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [**Personal Experimentation:**](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Actively experiments with new AI tools (e.g., AI web browsers).](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
      - [Has successfully used prompt engineering to train LLMs to match his personal writing style.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**GrowthX Expectation:** A "voracious" adoption of LLM tools is vital.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)
      - [This enables self-unblocking and building custom solutions, a key cultural shift from traditional media's resource-starved environment.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)

### GrowthX Culture & Operations

  - [**Team:** \~20 Managing Editors.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)
  - [**Workload:** 1–3 clients per ME, depending on complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)
      - [**Typical:** 2 clients, with 10–20 deliverables per week (pipeline-assisted).](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2345.0)
  - [**Culture:**](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
      - [**Remote-First:** Fully remote; no "second-class" status for remote employees.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2936.0)
      - [**Non-Toxic:** Leadership is committed to a genuine, collaborative environment.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
      - [**Aggressive Questioning Encouraged:** MEs are the "first users" of the product, and their feedback is critical for iteration.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aurelia:** Contact J-A with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)
  - [**J-A:** Potentially interview with other GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/hz4Cs9x4evhF8Lxg8HZUfJL16NeFfVLX?tab=summary&timestamp=3015.0)
